note: Serverless size-based rates apply uniformly to input and output tokens. The bucket rates below are quoted from the docs; the per-model bucket assignment is our assumption (Fireworks bills by served parameter count) and is overridable here. Unknown models fall back to default_price_per_1m.
deployment_note: Dedicated on-demand deployments (how we serve Gemma) bill by GPU-HOUR of UPTIME from the fireworks.ai/pricing page, not by tokens. Idle uptime bills the same as busy uptime.
